creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: sunpoet
Date: Mon May 26 15:33:54 2014
New Revision: 355381
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/355381
QAT: https://qat.redports.org/buildarchive/r355381/

Log:
  - Add LICENSE
  - Pass maintainership to submitter
  - While I'm here:
    - Fix *_DEPENDS: Test::Deep is a test-only dependency
    - Remove leading indefinite article from COMMENT
    - Bump PORTREVISION for dependency change
    - Remove Author line
  
  PR:		ports/190242
  Submitted by:	Muhammad Moinur Rahman <5u623l20@gmail.com>

Modified:
  head/devel/p5-Algorithm-Dependency-Objects/Makefile
  head/devel/p5-Algorithm-Dependency-Objects/pkg-descr

Modified: head/devel/p5-Algorithm-Dependency-Objects/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/devel/p5-Algorithm-Dependency-Objects/Makefile	Mon May 26 15:33:49 2014	(r355380)
+++ head/devel/p5-Algorithm-Dependency-Objects/Makefile	Mon May 26 15:33:54 2014	(r355381)
@@ -3,17 +3,20 @@
 
 PORTNAME=	Algorithm-Dependency-Objects
 PORTVERSION=	0.04
-PORTREVISION=	1
+PORTREVISION=	2
 CATEGORIES=	devel perl5
 MASTER_SITES=	CPAN
 PKGNAMEPREFIX=	p5-
 
-MAINTAINER=	ports@FreeBSD.org
-COMMENT=	An implementation of an Object Dependency Algorithm
+MAINTAINER=	5u623l20@gmail.com
+COMMENT=	Implementation of an Object Dependency Algorithm
 
-BUILD_DEPENDS=	p5-Set-Object>0:${PORTSDIR}/devel/p5-Set-Object \
-		p5-Test-Deep>0:${PORTSDIR}/devel/p5-Test-Deep
+LICENSE=	ART10 GPLv1
+LICENSE_COMB=	dual
+
+BUILD_DEPENDS=	p5-Set-Object>=0:${PORTSDIR}/devel/p5-Set-Object
 RUN_DEPENDS:=	${BUILD_DEPENDS}
+TEST_DEPENDS=	p5-Test-Deep>=0:${PORTSDIR}/devel/p5-Test-Deep
 
 USES=		perl5
 USE_PERL5=	configure

Modified: head/devel/p5-Algorithm-Dependency-Objects/pkg-descr
==============================================================================
--- head/devel/p5-Algorithm-Dependency-Objects/pkg-descr	Mon May 26 15:33:49 2014	(r355380)
+++ head/devel/p5-Algorithm-Dependency-Objects/pkg-descr	Mon May 26 15:33:54 2014	(r355381)
@@ -1,5 +1,4 @@
 This modules is a re-implementation of Algorithm::Dependency using only 
 objects instead of object ids, making use of Set::Object for book-keeping.
 
-Author: Yuval Kogman & Stevan Little
 WWW: http://search.cpan.org/dist/Algorithm-Dependency-Objects/
